overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through an urban underpass at night. The scene transitions from a narrow graffiti-covered corridor beneath a highway overpass to an open plaza area with colorful neon-lit bridge arches visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian character walking along the graffiti-covered brick wall under the overpass

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of the camera along the sidewalk, gradually moving toward the right edge of the frame

entered.detail: tall brick wall covered in white and gray graffiti tags running along the left side of the path
massive concrete highway overpass creating a roof over the walkway
metal chain-link fence running along the right side separating the walkway from the road
dark asphalt walkway with white painted lines

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person view following a character walking through a narrow urban corridor beneath a highway overpass. A graffiti-covered brick wall runs along the left side while a chain-link fence borders the right. The area is dimly lit by artificial light, creating a sheltered, enclosed atmosphere.

events.description: steam or fog effects become visible in the tunnel ahead, partially obscuring the view

agents.ego_description: continuing through the tunnel as atmospheric steam effects appear and the pedestrian ahead moves out of view

entered.detail: atmospheric steam or fog effects rising from the ground in the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the tunnel section where the pedestrian character is no longer visible. Steam or fog effects appear in the middle of the path, creating atmospheric haze. The graffiti wall recedes to the left mid-ground as the tunnel deepens.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel exit approaching neon-lit urban plaza

events.description: ground surface changes from asphalt to paved tiles as the tunnel opens toward the plaza
colorful neon-lit bridge arches become clearly visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the tunnel exit where the space opens up to reveal neon-lit bridges in the distance

entered.detail: light-colored paved tiles with square pattern replacing the asphalt
large bridge structures illuminated with red and blue neon lights visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The tunnel opens up as the ground transitions to paved tiles. The concrete overpass structure falls behind as colorful neon-lit bridge arches become visible in the distance ahead, marking the transition from the enclosed underpass to a more open urban plaza area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dim urban underpass that gradually opens into a vibrant, neon-lit plaza. It begins by following a character through a narrow corridor enclosed by a graffiti-covered brick wall and a chain-link fence under the heavy shadow of a highway overpass. As the camera pushes forward and the character disappears from view, the path becomes shrouded in a thick atmospheric haze of steam and fog. The scene then expands as the concrete walls recede and the ground shifts to paved tiles, leaving the sheltered tunnel behind. Finally, the view opens completely to reveal a wide urban space dominated by colorful neon-lit bridge arches glowing in the distance.
